meta.title: Services
meta.description: Brodsky Law PLLC handles uncontested divorce, contested divorce, child support, and spousal maintenance in New York. Flat fees, payment plans, licensed attorney.

hero.title: New York divorce and family law services.
hero.lead: Whether your divorce is straightforward or complex, we have the expertise and experience to handle it, at fees that are transparent from the start.

notSure.heading: Every situation is different. We'll help you figure it out.
notSure.body: Not sure whether your divorce will be contested, or what will happen with child support? Fill out a brief intake form and we'll review your situation, explain your options, and provide a clear quote at no obligation.
